mechanism_narrative: A sustained 3-month increase in the GDP growth rate signals a strengthening demand environment that boosts corporate earnings, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 60-day forward returns in high-GDP-growth periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A crossing of the federal funds rate above 4.5% signals a tightening monetary cycle that increases borrowing costs, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in high-FEDFUNDS periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A sustained 3-month decline in the unemployment rate signals a tightening labor market that boosts wage growth, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in low-UNRATE periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A joint increase in housing starts and retail sales signals a strengthening demand environment that boosts corporate earnings, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 60-day forward returns in high-HOUST-and-RSAFS periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A sustained 3-month increase in the industrial production index signals a strengthening supply environment that boosts corporate earnings, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in high-INDPRO periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A crossing of the federal funds rate below 2.5% signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 5-day forward returns in low-FEDFUNDS periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A joint increase in payroll employment and a decline in the unemployment rate signals a tightening labor market that boosts wage growth, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in high-PAYEMS-and-low-UNRATE periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A sustained 3-month increase in the consumer price index signals a strengthening demand environment that boosts corporate earnings, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 60-day forward returns in high-CPIAUCSL periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).
